name: 🔴 Failed operations (24h)
description: All failed ARM operations in the last 24 h
query:
AzureActivity
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Failed'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ResourceId, Caller, Properties
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100

name: 🔴 Failed sign-ins (Event 4625)
description: Windows failed authentication events
query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| summarize Attempts=count() by Account, IpAddress, Computer, LogonTypeName
| order by Attempts desc
| take 50

name: 🔴 Brute-force detection
description: Accounts with 10+ failed logins in 1 hour (brute-force indicator)
query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| summarize FailCount=count() by Account, IpAddress
| where FailCount >= 10
| order by FailCount desc

name: 🔴 Privilege escalation — admin group changes
description: Users added to or removed from privileged groups (Event 4728/4729/4732/4733)
query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4728, 4729, 4732, 4733)
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| project TimeGenerated, EventID, Activity, Account, MemberName, TargetAccount, Computer
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🔴 WAF blocked requests
description: Application Gateway WAF blocks in the last 24 h
query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'APPLICATIONGATEWAYS' and OperationName == 'ApplicationGatewayFirewall'
| where action_s == 'Blocked'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| summarize Blocks=count() by hostname_s, requestUri_s, ruleGroup_s, ruleId_s
| order by Blocks desc
| take 50

name: 🔴 WAF top blocked IPs
description: Top source IPs blocked by WAF
query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'APPLICATIONGATEWAYS' and OperationName == 'ApplicationGatewayFirewall'
| where action_s == 'Blocked'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| summarize Blocks=count() by clientIp_s
| order by Blocks desc
| take 20

name: 🔴 NSG denied flows
description: Denied network flows (requires NSG flow logs to workspace)
query:
AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL
| where FlowStatus_s == 'D'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| summarize Denials=count() by SrcIP_s, DestPort_d, NSGRule_s, L7Protocol_s
| order by Denials desc
| take 50

name: 🔴 SQL failed logins
description: SQL Server failed login attempts (requires SQL audit to workspace)
query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'SERVERS' and Category == 'SQLSecurityAuditEvents'
| where action_name_s == 'LOGIN FAILED'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, LogicalServerName_s, client_ip_s, database_principal_name_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🔴 Defender alerts
description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud security alerts
query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, ResourceId, Description, ExtendedProperties
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🟡 Role assignment changes
description: Azure RBAC role assignments added or removed (last 7 days)
query:
AzureActivity
| where OperationNameValue has 'roleAssignment'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, Caller, ResourceGroup, Properties, ActivityStatusValue
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🟡 Resource deletions
description: All successful resource delete operations (last 7 days)
query:
AzureActivity
| where OperationNameValue has 'delete' and ActivityStatusValue == 'Succeeded'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ResourceId, Caller
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🟡 VM start/stop events
description: Virtual machine power operations (start/stop/deallocate) in the last 7 days
query:
AzureActivity
| where OperationNameValue has_any ('virtualMachines/start','virtualMachines/deallocate','virtualMachines/powerOff','virtualMachines/restart')
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ResourceId, Caller, ActivityStatusValue
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🟡 NSG rule changes
description: Network security group rule modifications in the last 7 days
query:
AzureActivity
| where OperationNameValue has 'networkSecurityGroups'
| where ActivityStatusValue == 'Succeeded'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, ResourceGroup, ResourceId, Caller
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🟡 Resource creations this month
description: All new resources created in the current calendar month
query:
AzureActivity
| where OperationNameValue has 'write' and ActivityStatusValue == 'Succeeded'
| where TimeGenerated >= startofmonth(now())
| summarize Created=count() by ResourceGroup, Caller
| order by Created desc
| take 30

name: 🟡 Stale agent heartbeats
description: Agents that haven't sent a heartbeat in the last 15 minutes
query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat=max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, OSType, ComputerIP
| where LastHeartbeat < ago(15m)
| order by LastHeartbeat asc

name: 🟡 VM errors (Windows Event Log)
description: Windows Event Log errors from all VMs
query:
Event
| where EventLevelName == 'Error'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| summarize Errors=count() by Computer, EventID, RenderedDescription
| order by Errors desc
| take 50

name: 🟡 Syslog errors (Linux)
description: Linux syslog entries at Error or Warning level
query:
Syslog
| where SeverityLevel in ('err', 'crit', 'alert', 'emerg', 'warning')
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| summarize Count=count() by Computer, Facility, SeverityLevel, SyslogMessage
| order by Count desc
| take 50

name: 🟢 Top CPU VMs (last hour)
description: Top 10 VMs by average CPU utilisation over the last hour
query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Processor' and CounterName == '% Processor Time' and InstanceName == '_Total'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| summarize AvgCPU=avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| order by AvgCPU desc
| take 10

name: 🟢 High memory pressure
description: VMs with available memory below 500 MB
query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Memory' and CounterName in ('Available MBytes', 'Available Bytes')
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(30m)
| summarize AvailMB=avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where AvailMB < 500
| order by AvailMB asc

name: 🟢 Disk space low
description: Volumes with less than 10% free space
query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'LogicalDisk' and CounterName == '% Free Space' and InstanceName != '_Total'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(30m)
| summarize FreePct=avg(CounterValue) by Computer, InstanceName
| where FreePct < 10
| order by FreePct asc

name: 🟢 SQL slow queries
description: Long-running SQL queries (requires SQL Insights / Query Store)
query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'SERVERS/DATABASES' and Category == 'QueryStoreRuntimeStatistics'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| project TimeGenerated, LogicalServerName_s, DatabaseName_s, query_id_d, avg_duration_d
| order by avg_duration_d desc
| take 20

name: 🟢 PostgreSQL errors
description: PostgreSQL error-level log entries (requires AzureDiagnostics from PG diagnostic settings)
query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'FLEXIBLESERVERS' and Category == 'PostgreSQLLogs'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where error_severity_s in ('ERROR','FATAL','PANIC')
| project TimeGenerated, Resource, message_s, error_severity_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🟢 Network bandwidth top VMs
description: Top VMs by total network traffic (bytes in + out) over the last hour
query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Network Adapter' and CounterName in ('Bytes Received/sec','Bytes Sent/sec')
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| summarize TotalBytes=sum(CounterValue) by Computer
| order by TotalBytes desc
| take 10

name: 🟢 Cost anomaly — daily spike
description: Days where cost was 50% above the 7-day average (requires cost export to workspace)
query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'BILLINGACCOUNTS'
| summarize DailyCost=sum(todouble(Properties))
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| extend Rolling7d=series_stats_dynamic(DailyCost)
| where DailyCost > tolong(Rolling7d.avg) * 1.5
| order by TimeGenerated desc

name: 🔵 Active directory — locked accounts
description: Locked-out user accounts (Event 4740)
query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4740
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, TargetAccount, Computer, SubjectAccount
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🔵 Entra sign-ins — guest users
description: Sign-in events from guest/external accounts (requires Entra diagnostic logs)
query:
SigninLogs
| where UserType == 'Guest'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| project TimeGenerated, UserDisplayName, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Location, AppDisplayName, ResultType, ResultDescription
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🔵 Update compliance
description: VMs missing critical or security updates (requires Update Management)
query:
Update
| where Classification in ('Critical Updates','Security Updates') and UpdateState == 'Needed'
| summarize MissingUpdates=count() by Computer, Classification
| order by MissingUpdates desc
| take 30

name: 🔵 Application Gateway access log
description: Recent requests through Application Gateway (status, latency, backend)
query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'APPLICATIONGATEWAYS' and OperationName == 'ApplicationGatewayAccess'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| project TimeGenerated, requestUri_s, httpStatus_d, timeTaken_d, clientIP_s, backendPoolName_s, backendHttpSettingsName_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100

name: 🔵 Key Vault access
description: Key Vault secret / key access events (requires Key Vault diagnostic logs)
query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == 'VAULTS'
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, ResultType, CallerIPAddress, identity_claim_appid_g, id_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

name: 🔵 Storage account access
description: Azure Blob Storage access events (requires storage diagnostic logs)
query:
StorageBlobLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| summarize Requests=count() by CallerIpAddress, AccountName, OperationName, StatusCode
| order by Requests desc
| take 30
